name: ctf-autopwn-orchestrator
description: Orchestrate CTF solving across local shell tools and a remote Kali API backend.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local tmpfiles/bore with remote Kali API
interface.longDescription: Use local command-line tmpfiles and bore for transfer/tunneling, then execute full CTF workflows in remote Kali containers through pure HTTP APIs.
defaultPrompt: Use local tmpfiles and bore commands, then solve the challenge inside remote Kali via API
